code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
    let b = match b_opt
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let toggled = if b >= 65 and b <= 90
      b + 32
    else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      b - 32
    else
      b
    end
    result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(toggled)}"
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
